problem_statement: The selected read-only worker path has a live runtime receipt emitter registration witness, but the next evidence boundary needs a schema-backed live runtime receipt emission admission witness that defines required activation evidence while keeping live runtime authority blocked.
success_criteria: ReadOnlyWorkerRuntimeReceiptEmissionAdmissionWitness validates against a public JSON schema and Foundation Mode example

the witness binds the runtime receipt emitter registration witness plus upstream schema-binding, receipt-store write-path, dispatch endpoint registration, runner registration, runtime receipt candidate, runner binding, emitter dry-run, handoff, binding, lease preflight, and rehearsal evidence
live runtime receipt emission admission witness is defined without activating a receipt store
runtime receipt emission admission remains unperformed
runtime receipt schema binding remains unperformed
runtime receipt emitter registration remains unperformed

the future receipt emission admission path requires operator approval, emitter registration evidence, emitter identity digest, schema identity digest, activation boundary, schema registry boundary, temporal lease evidence, UAO, Phi_gov, WorkerFailureReceipt, receipt-store evidence, and effect reconciliation
focused tests reject authority drift, contract drift, missing refs, activation evaluation drift, admission drift, receipt-ref drift, count drift, and malformed payloads
non_goals: no launch, production, customer, or support readiness claim
constraints: live runtime receipt emission admission witness is witness-only
runtime receipt emitter registration remains unperformed
runtime receipt schema binding remains unperformed

future dispatch admission must still require operator approval, live emitter evidence, schema identity digest, schema activation boundary, temporal lease evidence, UAO, Phi_gov, recovery evidence, runtime emitter evidence, receipt-store evidence, and verification
WorkerFailureReceipt remains mandatory for failed or partial dispatch evidence
raw output retention remains denied and only output digests may be carried
Mfidel atomicity remains preserved and no text-processing decomposition is introduced
evidence_required: runtime receipt emission admission witness validator receipt
focused pytest receipt for runtime receipt emission admission witness behavior
workspace governance preflight receipt before closure claim
